title: Hard-cut planning terminology and phase vocabulary
summary: Replace retired planning-model language and stale initiative phase names on active surfaces with the initiative-package model.
scope_items: Rename active route and workflow terminology to initiative brief, design record, and implementation slice.
Replace initiative phase filters and registry values with capture, execution, closeout, and closed.
done_when_items: Active routes, schemas, standards, queries, and trackers expose only endstate terminology and phase values.
